title: allow Write(*) + ask Write(*) -> ask wins over allow, Write stays pre-approval-gated (ask)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $CASE_DIR/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.

hypothesis: allow と ask が同じ Write(*) にマッチしても、評価順 deny->ask->allow により ask が先に当たり承認要求になる。P2-a（allow 単独で✅）との対照。SDK で canUseTool 発火を確認して engine=ask を確定する。
notes: MEASURED 2026-07-05: headless=DENIED, SDK=ASK (askFired=Write) despite allow Write(*) co-present -> ask beats allow. spec §2: order deny->ask->allow.
